title: The Neural Pathway to Success
summary: Reflective essay from MIT Sloan's 15.318 Discovering Your Leadership Signature, using the metaphor of neural pathways to examine personal growth, intentionality, and how to evolve a leadership signature through repeated, deliberate practice.

title: Ethical Stakes of Data-Centered Research
summary: UC Berkeley DATA C104 essay analyzing the social and ethical implications of using demographic data in workplace optimization, drawing on case studies like the COMPAS recidivism algorithm to argue for stronger institutional regulation of data-driven research.
